form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Most recently favourite; ran on from midfield and won by 2 len at Urawa March 19 over 800m defeating Siena Wave with 57kg at $2.50. Before that 2nd of 9 at this track on March 5 over 900m, head behind Tony Prince with 56kg at $5.10. Great chance to win with the aid of the inside stall.

form.formComment: First-up. Finished off last preparation when last of 12 at this track January 1 over 900m, 12 len behind Mitono Cat carrying 55kg at $302.20. Previously first up; fourth of 16 at Niigata May 4 over 1000m, 5.5 len behind Nishino Cognac with 56.0kg at $40.30. Not keen on her chances.

form.formComment: Third-up today and won third-up in the past. Resuming 4th of 9 at this track on February 2 over 900m, 6 len behind Lino Destino with 57kg at $7. Second-up led but faded 2nd of 9 at this track on March 2 over 900m, 3 len behind Praelude with 55kg at $12.10. Genuine hope on best form.

form.formComment: Has won previously first-up and resumes here after a break of three-and-a-half months. Finished off last campaign by neck Ohi December 26 over 1200m defeating Neo Tokio carrying 55kg at $4. First up last campaign ninth of 12 at Sonoda November 6 over 1400m, 6 len behind Holy Grail with 55kg at $19. Expect a forward showing.

form.formComment: Third-up today. Resuming 9th of 12 at Urawa on February 27 over 1500m, 14 len behind Edono Banzai with 54kg at $86.20. Second run from a spell 4th in a small field at Funabashi on March 13 over 1000m, 6 len behind Satono Mustang carrying 53kg at $42.80. Will need to improve many lengths to feature.

form.formComment: Resuming after a break of three-and-a-half months. Finished off last preparation third of 12 at this track January 1 over 900m, 1.5 len behind Mitono Cat with 55kg at $7.60. When resuming last campaign ran last of 11 at this track October 14 over 900m, 9 len behind Freedom with 49kg at $2.10. Hasn't shown enough.

form.formComment: Recent form sound. Comes here off a 40-day let-up. Last start crossed from a wide gate to lead but couldn't hold on when 2nd of 12 at Urawa on February 25 over 800m, head behind Cutie Romera carrying 57kg at $1.20. The race before that favourite; won by 2 len at Funabashi January 22 over 1000m defeating Bismarck carrying 57kg at $1.70. Leading player.

form.formComment: Most recently second last in a small field at Funabashi on March 13 over 1000m, 8 len behind Satono Mustang with 53kg at $4.60. The run before that won by a head at Urawa February 25 over 800m defeating Smoke Flavor carrying 55kg at $27.40. Safely held last time out but this suits.

form.formComment: Returns from a 35-day let-up. Last start 6th of 9 at this track on March 2 over 900m, 4.5 len behind Praelude carrying 53kg at $6.40. Before that ran on from midfield; 2nd of 9 at this track on February 2 over 900m, 0.8 len behind Lino Destino with 55kg at $7.20. Strong winning hope.
